headline: Fairlife pauses US production after cyberattack breached milk brand's systems
summary: Milk brand Fairlife is pausing its production in the U.S. after a ransomware cyberattack breached the company's systems.  Coca-Cola, which owns Fairlife, announced Thursday that its dairy company had identified “unauthorized access by a third party” to a portion of its systems, including those related to production.  “Product quality and safety have not been impacted," Atlanta-based Coca-Cola said in a statement.

raw.headline: Fairlife pauses US production after cyberattack breached milk brand's systems
raw.summary: Milk brand Fairlife is pausing its production in the U.S. after a ransomware cyberattack breached the company's systems.  Coca-Cola, which owns Fairlife, announced Thursday that its dairy company had identified “unauthorized access by a third party” to a portion of its systems, including those related to production.  “Product quality and safety have not been impacted," Atlanta-based Coca-Cola said in a statement.

headline: Growing an Income Tree: From $27,000 to $66,000
summary: A portfolio that pays $27,000 a year in dividends sounds modest. Left alone for a little more than a decade of steady dividend growth, that same income stream can quietly grow toward $66,000 without a single additional dollar of savings. That is the basic appeal of dividend growth investing: the arithmetic of today’s yield matters, ... Growing an Income Tree: From $27,000 to $66,000
